title: Marcus's Morning Sounds
synopsis: Little Marcus wakes up to discover all the wonderful sounds of a cozy Sunday morning with his family - from sizzling pancakes to chirping birds.

pages.text: Marcus opens his eyes. What does he hear?

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes lying in bed in cozy pajamas, golden sunlight streaming through windows, soft morning light illuminating a child's bedroom
illustration.alt: Marcus waking up in his sunny bedroom

pages.text: Sizzle! Pop! Mama makes pancakes in the kitchen.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes standing in doorway watching his mama cook pancakes, golden hour light filling modern kitchen, family pajamas, newspapers on counter

pages.text: Tweet! Tweet! Birds sing outside the window.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes looking out sunlit window at birds in tree, gentle unhurried Sunday morning atmosphere, warm domestic setting

pages.text: Tick-tock! The clock says it's breakfast time!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes pointing at wall clock, Sunday morning light streaming in, modern diverse family home, lazy morning feeling

pages.text: Yum! Marcus hears his tummy rumble. Time to eat!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sitting at breakfast table with family, golden hour light, pancakes and newspapers, gentle unhurried morning scene, warm domestic atmosphere
illustration.alt: Marcus enjoying breakfast with his family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: Pancakes sizzle and pop when they cook in the pan!

questions.question: What sound do the birds make?
questions.explanation: Birds make tweeting sounds when they sing!

questions.question: What makes the tick-tock sound?
questions.explanation: Clocks make tick-tock sounds to show the time!
